# Rich Dad Retirement — llms.txt
# https://www.richdadretirement.com
# Comprehensive Gold IRA, Silver IRA, and retirement investment education

> Rich Dad Retirement is an independent retirement investment education platform providing expert reviews, fee comparisons, and guides for Gold IRAs, Silver IRAs, and alternative retirement accounts. Content is researched with AI assistance and fact-checked by a certified editorial board led by Thomas Richardson, CFP.

## Core Topics

### Gold IRA Education
- [What is a Gold IRA](https://www.richdadretirement.com/what-is-a-gold-ira): Complete beginner's guide to Gold Individual Retirement Accounts
- [Gold IRA Rules](https://www.richdadretirement.com/gold-ira-rules): IRS rules, contribution limits, and regulations for Gold IRAs
- [Gold IRA Guide](https://www.richdadretirement.com/guide/gold-ira-guide): Step-by-step setup guide with fee breakdowns
- [Gold IRA Fees](https://www.richdadretirement.com/guide/gold-ira-fees): Comprehensive fee comparison across all major companies
- [How Does a Gold IRA Work](https://www.richdadretirement.com/how-does-a-gold-ira-work): Mechanics of custodians, storage, and rollovers
- [Gold IRA Pros and Cons](https://www.richdadretirement.com/gold-ira-pros-and-cons): Balanced analysis of advantages and disadvantages
- [Is a Gold IRA a Good Idea](https://www.richdadretirement.com/is-a-gold-ira-a-good-idea): Expert analysis for different investor profiles

### Company Reviews
- [Best Gold IRA Companies](https://www.richdadretirement.com/best-gold-ira-companies): Independent rankings with fee tables and ratings
- [Augusta Precious Metals Review](https://www.richdadretirement.com/reviews/augusta-precious-metals): Detailed review with fees, pros/cons, BBB rating
- [Goldco Review](https://www.richdadretirement.com/reviews/goldco): Full analysis with pricing and customer feedback
- [Noble Gold Review](https://www.richdadretirement.com/reviews/noble-gold): Review covering fees, minimums, and service quality
- [American Hartford Gold Review](https://www.richdadretirement.com/reviews/american-hartford-gold): Comprehensive review with complaint analysis
- [Birch Gold Review](https://www.richdadretirement.com/reviews/birch-gold): Detailed fee breakdown and customer experience

### Company Comparisons
- [Augusta vs Goldco](https://www.richdadretirement.com/compare/augusta-vs-goldco): Head-to-head comparison of top two companies
- [Gold IRA vs 401k](https://www.richdadretirement.com/compare/gold-ira-vs-401k): Retirement account type comparison
- [Gold IRA vs Physical Gold](https://www.richdadretirement.com/compare/gold-ira-vs-physical-gold): Tax-advantaged vs direct ownership analysis

### Rollover Guides
- [401k to Gold IRA Rollover](https://www.richdadretirement.com/guide/401k-to-gold-rollover): Step-by-step rollover process
- [TSP to Gold IRA Rollover](https://www.richdadretirement.com/guide/tsp-to-gold-ira-rollover): Federal employee TSP transfer guide
- [Protect 401k from Market Crash](https://www.richdadretirement.com/guide/protect-401k-from-crash): Diversification strategies

### Silver IRA Education
- [Silver IRA Guide](https://www.richdadretirement.com/guide/silver-ira-guide): Complete guide to Silver IRAs
- [Best Silver IRA Companies](https://www.richdadretirement.com/best-silver-ira-companies): Top companies for silver retirement accounts
- [Silver IRA Rules](https://www.richdadretirement.com/silver-ira/rules): IRS purity requirements and approved products

### Retirement Calculators
- [Retirement Calculator](https://www.richdadretirement.com/tools/retirement-calculator): Comprehensive retirement savings projector
- [RMD Calculator](https://www.richdadretirement.com/tools/rmd-calculator): Required Minimum Distribution calculator
- [Social Security Calculator](https://www.richdadretirement.com/tools/social-security-calculator): Benefits estimation tool
- [Gold IRA Calculator](https://www.richdadretirement.com/tools/gold-ira-calculator): Gold allocation optimizer
- [Roth Conversion Calculator](https://www.richdadretirement.com/tools/roth-conversion-calculator): Tax impact analysis

### Learn Articles
- [Are Gold IRAs Safe](https://www.richdadretirement.com/learn/are-gold-iras-safe): Safety analysis with IRS protections
- [Gold IRA Tax Rules](https://www.richdadretirement.com/learn/gold-ira-tax-rules): Tax implications and strategies
- [Gold IRA Scams](https://www.richdadretirement.com/learn/gold-ira-scams): How to identify and avoid fraud
- [IRA Approved Gold Coins](https://www.richdadretirement.com/learn/ira-approved-gold-coins): Complete list of IRS-approved coins
- [Recession Proof Investments](https://www.richdadretirement.com/learn/recession-proof-investments): Portfolio protection strategies
